title: Thirst and Stamina Bar
description: A mod that adds a thirst and stamina bar!
body:
# Thirst and Stamina Bar!
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1247254072696897596?label=join%20our%20discord&logo=discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/T5nnUu9CWv)


This mod adds two new bars, The Thirst bar and the Stamina bar.

I am also open to suggestions in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/T5nnUu9CWv)

# 💧 Thirst

To regain thirst you first have to craft 4 dirty water bottle with 4 bottles and a water bucket. Then to purify this bottle by smelting it.

# ⚡ Stamina

Stamina runs out when you sprint and jump and you can regain it by normally walking.
